core_payload.content:
# N1Hub.com: Future Sovereign Habitat

## 1. Role
N1Hub is the sovereign habitat that turns doctrine into one coherent operating field. It routes that habitat through five bounded sub-hubs so doctrinal meaning, intelligence production, operator surfaces, daemon coordination, and program lines remain explicit instead of collapsing into one parent directory.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `doctrinal-core` owns existential direction, capsule-generation doctrine, and sovereign capital posture.
- `intelligence-fabric` owns mining, refinery work, and swarm reasoning over graph state.
- `operator-surfaces` owns assistant partnership, chat ingress, control visibility, and graph reading.
- `runtime-coordination` owns daemon continuity, orchestration, agent-lane coordination, and stewardship runtime.
- `program-lines` owns access posture, flagship program lines, and the active sovereign-refactor track.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent N1Hub hub keeps only the top-level relationship to CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, N1Hub Gold Master, the N1Hub v0 project envelope, and the five runtime sub-hubs. Detailed habitat routing now flows through those sub-hubs so N1Hub remains the sovereign runtime contract for the larger field rather than a flat list of every adjacent system and strategic line.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub routes the habitat through five bounded surfaces: doctrinal core, intelligence fabric, operator surfaces, runtime coordination, and program lines. The parent keeps only top-level relationships to CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, N1Hub Gold Master, the N1Hub v0 project envelope, and the five sub-hubs. This makes future habitat doctrine more legible because philosophy, cognition, human ingress, daemon continuity, and strategic expansion no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: The capsule content details a comprehensive ecosystem with distinct modules (DeepMine, A2C, N-Infinity, Workspace, TileSims, Marketplace) and foundational elements (CapsuleOS, 5-Element Law, Quality Gates). The original summary was broad; refining it to highlight integration and adding keywords grounded in the text improves modularity and completeness without inventing new doctrine.

The Dream N1Hub capsule was narrowed to future-only habitat doctrine after Real became the explicit canonical source for the current N1Hub runtime contract. This preserves the larger vision without leaving the branch split implicit.
Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
Refactored Dream N1Hub into five bounded sub-hubs so doctrinal meaning, intelligence production, operator surfaces, daemon coordination, and program lines no longer collapse into one parent hub.
